input.command: git add src/services/inbox_service.rs src/infrastructure/waiting_for_repository.rs src/routes/inbox.rs templates/inbox_item.html static/css/main.css tests/api/inbox.rs docs/glossary.md docs/deferred-items.md .claude-sessions/
input.description: Stage all Step 9 changes and session transcripts

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Clarify as Waiting For (Step 9): inbox item to waiting-for clarify path

Extends the existing POST /inbox/{id}/clarify endpoint with a third
clarify_type=waiting_for option. Inbox items can now be clarified as
Waiting For items by specifying who/what the user is waiting on.

Changes:
- Service: clarify_as_waiting_for() in inbox_service.rs with transactional
  workflow (find inbox item, create WaitingForItem, delete inbox item)
- Infrastructure: insert_waiting_for_item now accepts impl PgExecutor
  for transaction support
- Route: waiting_for branch in post_clarify_inbox_item with full error
  handling (InvalidWaitingOn, empty/too-long validation)
- Template: "Waiting For" radio + waiting_on input with CSS :has()
  progressive disclosure; context selector hidden for waiting-for path
- Tests: 7 new integration tests (happy path, 404, HTMX announce,
  empty/too-long validation); updated existing clarify form test
- Glossary: new action, error types, user-facing copy, state machine
- Deferred: "Convert Waiting For to Next Action" tracked for later

9/9 team consensus. 312 tests + 11 Playwright e2e green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
